$comment: Per-repo config for the org source-leak-gate caller (.github/workflows/source-leak-gate.yml). This repo carries a local copy of the actions-pinned-gate engine (scripts/audit/actions-pinned-gate.mjs + its test), whose source and tests necessarily contain the version-comment markers they enforce (`# vX.Y.Z` after a pinned SHA) — exactly like the source-leak scanner's own rule definitions contain the markers it detects. The skills-drift-gate.yml caller (cinatra#188) carries the literal gate name `skills-drift-gate`, which the source-leak SLG_PLANNING_DOC rule treats as a `drift-gate` planning-artifact marker — a self-referential false positive identical in kind to the actions-pinned-gate case, mirroring the exemption cinatra-ai/ci applies to its own copy in config/self-check.json. The dashboards v1.2 migration `core__0006_dashboards-v12.mjs` (cinatra#327) is inherently a marker-bearing artifact: it migrates legacy dashboard rows TO the dashboard config schema's literal `apiVersion` value `v1.2` (the existing DASHBOARD_CONFIG_V12_VERSION constant), so its SQL literals (`config_version = 'v1.2'`) and prose unavoidably carry the bare `vN.N` token the SLG_MILESTONE_VERSION rule matches — NOT a release-milestone reference. That is the same self-referential class as the gate-engine exemptions; the shared schema files (drizzle-store.ts/store/schema.ts) that also gain a single `v1.2` default are deliberately NOT exempted (they carry an inline uppercase _VERSION marker so only that line is excused). The `branch-protections.json` documentation-of-record manifest lists the live `required_status_checks.contexts`, which legitimately include the literal required-check name `skills-drift-gate / skills-drift-gate`; the source-leak SLG_PLANNING_DOC rule treats that embedded `drift-gate` substring as a planning-artifact marker — a self-referential false positive identical in kind to the skills-drift-gate.yml caller exemption already present (the file must carry the real gate name to document live protection). Those files are exempted by basename. Nothing else is exempted.
